title: North Korea's latest weapons tests reveal ballistic missile with cluster bomb capability: ‘Can reduce targets to ashes’
content:
North Korea's latest weapons tests have revealed a new ballistic missile.
*   This missile possesses cluster bomb capability.
*   The weapon is described as being able to "reduce targets to ashes," indicating extreme destructive power.

title: Jim Whittaker dies at 97 — Here's all to know about the 1st American to summit Mount Everest
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Jim Whittaker, the first American to summit Mount Everest, has died at the age of 97.
*   The news highlights his historic achievement as a pioneering mountaineer.
*   The report will provide further details about his life and legacy.

title: Govt may seek RBI move to relax NPA norms to cushion MSMEs from war impact
content:
The government may ask the Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
*   To relax Non-Performing Asset (NPA) norms.
*   This move aims to cushion Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) from the economic impact of the war.

title: Quote of the Day: Shakespeare’s famous line ‘All the world’s a stage…’ captures life’s hidden truth
content:
The headline features Shakespeare's famous line, "All the world's a stage..."
*   It presents this quote as today's "Quote of the Day."
*   The quote is highlighted for its ability to capture a profound, hidden truth about life.

title: Elevated crude prices to increase imported inflation, widen CAD: Malhotra
content:
**Elevated crude oil prices** are the primary concern.
*   These higher prices are expected to **increase imported inflation**.
*   Consequently, the **Current Account Deficit (CAD) is projected to widen.**

title: RBI simplifies TReDS onboarding for MSMEs
content:
The RBI has simplified the process for Micro, Small, and Medium Enterprises (MSMEs) to join the TReDS platform.
*   TReDS (Trade Receivables Discounting System) allows MSMEs to discount their trade receivables (invoices) and get quick payment.
*   This move aims to improve MSMEs' access to credit and working capital by making the platform more accessible and less cumbersome.

title: NTPC inks MoU with Électricité de France for cooperation in nuclear power generation
content:
NTPC has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Électricité de France (EDF).
*   The agreement focuses on cooperation specifically in the field of nuclear power generation.
*   This collaboration aims to leverage the expertise of both companies in advancing nuclear energy projects.

title: RBI MPC keeps repo rate unchanged at 5.25%
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Reserve Bank of India's Monetary Policy Committee (RBI MPC) has decided to keep the repo rate unchanged.
*   The repo rate will remain at its current level of 5.25%.
*   This signifies a continuation of the existing interest rate by the central bank.

title: RBI MPC meeting Highlights: Headline inflation remains our target, and managing that is our primary goal, says RBI Governor
content:
The RBI Governor reiterated the central bank's focus during the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) meeting.
*   Headline inflation remains the primary target for the Reserve Bank of India.
*   Managing and controlling this inflation is identified as the RBI's paramount goal.
